name: Chocolate Peek-a-Boos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter and milk together over medium heat.
3. Gradually add flour, sugar, and cook until the mixture forms a ball.
4. Remove from heat and beat in eggs one at a time, ensuring well combined.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Allow the batter to cool for 30 minutes before adding chocolate chips.
7. Spoon small portions of batter onto a lined cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 15 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
